message:
Fix register_agent task_description clearing and FrankenSQLite compat

queries.rs:
- Always set task_description on re-registration instead of preserving
  stale content when omitted — matches INSERT path behavior
- Rewrite flush_deferred_touches batch UPDATE to use correlated
  subquery instead of UPDATE...FROM, which FrankenSQLite's VDBE
  codegen path doesn't support
- Fix release_reservation_chunk_plan test constants to use
  MAX_RELEASE_RESERVATION_CHUNK_ITEMS instead of halved filter limits

schema.rs:
- Simplify test INSERT to use inline literals instead of parameterized
  values for readability
- Minor comment and whitespace cleanup in migration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
